title: <div>You can gather strong evidence to support your persuasive argument essay us
content:
You can gather strong evidence to support your persuasive argument essay using various research methods and carefully evaluating online sources.

skeptical to less skeptical: blogs, pubs from advocacy groups, daily news, mainstream media, books, journal articles.Long Description

Credible Sources
Instructions
Sort the following cards as "Likely a Credible Source" or "Likely an Uncredible Source."



After you finish this page, click Next to continue to APA Style Writing.

Week 5 | APA Style Writing

APA Style Writing


The American Psychological Association (APA) is a scientific and professional organization representing psychologists in the United States. APA is a writing style and format researchers use in the social sciences and other fields. The APA guidelines are designed to help writers communicate their research concisely and accurately.
